//w/0---
title: "analysis"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
Nch=300

fs = 50e3
nsamples= 25
noise=1e-4 *fs/nsamples
```


```{r}
filenames=c(
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_NR",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MNR",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MNRV",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_R",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MR",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MRV",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_IR",
  "data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_IRV"
  
  
)

algorithms=c("NR"
             ,"MNR"
             ,"MNRV"
             ,"R"
             ,"MR"
             ,"MRV"
             ,"IR"
             ,"IRV"
             )

```


```{r}

d=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(filenames)){
  
  d0=read.csv(paste0(filenames[i],".csv"))
  d0$algo=algorithms[i]
  d=rbind(d,d0)
}

```

```{r}
d_s=read.csv("data/figure_1_simulation.csv")
```


```{r}
d%>%filter(component%in%c("logL","elogL","y_mean","y_var", "Chi2"))%>%select(n_step,primitive,algo,component)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = component,values_from = primitive)->dd
```



```{r}

d<-d%>%filter(n_step>1)
d_s<-d_s%>%filter(n_step>1)

d_MRV=d%>%filter(algo=="MRV")%>%select(-row_kind,-param_index, -param_name,-param_col,-derivative_value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = primitive)

d_IRV=d%>%filter(algo=="IRV")%>%select(-row_kind,-param_index, -param_name,-param_col,-derivative_value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = primitive)

common_theme = theme_classic()+ theme( legend.position = "right")

compact_theme <- common_theme +theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "right",
  plot.margin = margin(1, 5, 1, 5)
)
x_only_ticks=theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
y_only_ticks=theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank())
no_y_axis= theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis text
         axis.title.y = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis title
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank())
no_x_axis= theme( axis.text.x = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis text
         axis.title.x = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis title
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank())
y_no_title=theme(axis.title.y = element_blank())


xmin=min(d$step_start)
xmax=max(d$step_end)

dx=xmax-xmin
x_scale<-scale_x_continuous(limits = c(xmin-0.05*dx, xmax+0.05*dx))


d_step_IR=0.1
d_step_MR= 0.1

(
ggplot(d_MRV)+
geom_segment(data=d_s%>%filter(row_kind=="sub"),aes(x=step_start,xend=step_end, y=patch_current/-Nch), color="black")+
geom_point( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), lag(P_mean_t2_y1_1), color="prior"))+
geom_point( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t1_y1_1, color="posterior"))+
geom_point( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t2_y1_1, color="posterior"))+
geom_point( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t2_y0_1, color="prior"),alpha=0.5)+

  geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y= lag(P_mean_t2_y1_1),
                  xend=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t1_y1_1, color="Bayes"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+

    geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t1_y1_1,
      xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t2_y1_1, color="Markov"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+
geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t2_y1_1),
xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start),yend= P_mean_t2_y0_1, color="Markov"),alpha=0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+

geom_segment( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t2_y1_1,
              xend= lead(step_start)+ d_step_IR*(lead(step_end)-lead(step_start)), yend=    P_mean_t2_y1_1, color="Markov"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+
  x_scale+
  common_theme+
  ylab("open state\nprobability")
  

)+(


ggplot(d_IRV)+
geom_segment(data=d_s%>%filter(row_kind=="sub"),aes(x=step_start,xend=step_end, y=patch_current/-Nch), color="black")+
geom_point( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1), color="prior"))+
geom_point( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t10_y1_1, color="posterior"),alpha=0.5)+
geom_point( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t20_y1_1, color="posterior"))+
geom_point( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), P_mean_t11_y0_1, color="prior"))+
geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1),
                  xend=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start),yend= P_mean_t10_y1_1, color="Bayes"),alpha=0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+

geom_segment( aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75 +
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25, 
                  y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1) *0.75+
                    P_mean_t11_y0_1 *0.25,
                  xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75+
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25,
                  yend= P_mean_t10_y1_1 *0.75 +
                    P_mean_t20_y1_1 *0.25, 
                  color="Bayes"),alpha=0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.03,"in")))+

geom_segment( aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5 +
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5, 
                  y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1) *0.5+
                    P_mean_t11_y0_1 *0.5,
                  xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5+
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5,
                  yend= P_mean_t10_y1_1 *0.5 +
                    P_mean_t20_y1_1 *0.5, 
                  color="Bayes"),alpha=0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.03,"in")))+

  geom_segment( aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25 +
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75, 
                  y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1) *0.25+
                    P_mean_t11_y0_1 *0.75,
                  xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25+
                    (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75,
                  yend= P_mean_t10_y1_1 *0.25 +
                    P_mean_t20_y1_1 *0.75, 
                  color="Bayes"),alpha=0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.03,"in")))+
  
  
geom_segment( aes(xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend= P_mean_t20_y1_1, x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t11_y0_1, color="Bayes"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+

geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t10_y1_1,
      xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t20_y1_1, color="posterior"),alpha=0.5)+
geom_segment( aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1),
xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start),yend= P_mean_t11_y0_1, color="Markov"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+

geom_segment( aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t20_y1_1,
              xend= lead(step_start)+ d_step_IR*(lead(step_end)-lead(step_start)), yend=    P_mean_t20_y1_1, color="Markov"), arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in")))+
  x_scale+
  common_theme+no_y_axis

)+ plot_layout(guides = "collect")
```

```{r}

d_IRV%>%mutate(m_0_y0=lag(P_mean_t20_y1_1),s_0_y0=lag(P_Cov_t20_y1_1_1), m_1_y0= P_mean_t11_y0_1, s_1_y0=P_Cov_t11_y0_1_1,s_01_y0=P_var_ii_0t_y0_1_1,
               m_0_y1=P_mean_t10_y1_1, s_0_y1=P_Cov_t10_y1_1_1, m_1_y1=P_mean_t20_y1_1, s_1_y1=P_Cov_t20_y1_1_1,s_01_y1=P_var_ii_0t_y1_1_1,n_step=n_step,.keep = "none")->p_IRV

d_MRV%>%mutate(m_0_y0=lag(P_mean_t2_y1_1),s_0_y0=lag(P_Cov_t2_y1_1_1), m_1_y0= P_mean_t2_y0_1, s_1_y0=P_Cov_t2_y0_1_1,s_01_y0=P_var_ii_0t_y0_1_1,
               m_0_y1=P_mean_t1_y1_1, s_0_y1=P_Cov_t1_y1_1_1, m_1_y1=P_mean_t2_y1_1, s_1_y1=P_Cov_t2_y1_1_1,s_01_y1=P_var_ii_0t_y1_1_1,n_step=n_step,.keep = "none")->p_MRV




```


```{r}
p_IRV
p_MRV
```




```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ellipse)

# --- 1. Helper Function ---
# Generates a data frame for an ellipse given Mean and Covariance
get_ellipse_df <- function(mu, sigma, label, level = 0.95) {
  # Calculate ellipse points
  # ellipse() expects a correlation matrix or covariance matrix
  # If sigma is covariance, we pass it directly.
  coords <- ellipse(sigma, centre = mu, level = level, npoints = 200)
  df <- as.data.frame(coords)
  df$Type <- label # Tag the data for ggplot grouping
  return(df)
}

# --- 2. Define Parameters ---

# A. PRIOR (High uncertainty, centered at 0,0)
mu_prior_IRV <- c(p_IRV$m_0_y0[3],p_IRV$m_1_y0[3] )
sigma_prior_IRV <- matrix(c(p_IRV$s_0_y0[3], p_IRV$s_01_y0[3],  # Large variance, some correlation
                        p_IRV$s_01_y0[3], p_IRV$s_1_y0[3]), nrow = 2)/Nch


mu_prior_MRV <- c(p_MRV$m_0_y0[3],p_MRV$m_1_y0[3] )
sigma_prior_MRV <- matrix(c(p_MRV$s_0_y0[3], p_MRV$s_01_y0[3],  # Large variance, some correlation
                        p_MRV$s_01_y0[3], p_MRV$s_1_y0[3]), nrow = 2)/Nch

# B. POSTERIOR (Lower uncertainty, shifted center)
# (In a real scenario, you calculate this via conjugate math. 
# Here we define it manually to show the visual effect.)
mu_post_IRV <- c(p_IRV$m_0_y1[3],p_IRV$m_1_y1[3] )
sigma_post_IRV  <- matrix(c(p_IRV$s_0_y1[3], p_IRV$s_01_y1[3],  # Large variance, some correlation
                        p_IRV$s_01_y1[3], p_IRV$s_1_y1[3]), nrow = 2)/Nch

mu_post_MRV <- c(p_MRV$m_0_y1[3],p_MRV$m_1_y1[3] )
sigma_post_MRV  <- matrix(c(p_IRV$s_0_y1[3], p_MRV$s_01_y1[3],  # Large variance, some correlation
                        p_MRV$s_01_y1[3], p_MRV$s_1_y1[3]), nrow = 2)/Nch



# --- 3. Generate Data ---
df_prior_IRV <- get_ellipse_df(mu_prior_IRV, sigma_prior_IRV, "Prior")
df_post_IRV  <- get_ellipse_df(mu_post_IRV, sigma_post_IRV, "Posterior")
plot_data_IRV <- rbind(df_prior_IRV, df_post_IRV)

# Create a separate data frame for the means (centers)
centers_IRV <- data.frame(
  x = c(mu_prior_IRV[1], mu_post_IRV[1]),
  y = c(mu_prior_IRV[2], mu_post_IRV[2]),
  Type = c("Prior", "Posterior")
)

df_prior_MRV <- get_ellipse_df(mu_prior_MRV, sigma_prior_MRV, "Prior")
df_post_MRV  <- get_ellipse_df(mu_post_MRV, sigma_post_MRV, "Posterior")
plot_data_MRV <- rbind(df_prior_MRV, df_post_MRV)

# Create a separate data frame for the means (centers)
centers_MRV <- data.frame(
  x = c(mu_prior_MRV[1], mu_post_MRV[1]),
  y = c(mu_prior_MRV[2], mu_post_MRV[2]),
  Type = c("Prior", "Posterior")
)



# --- 4. Plot with ggplot ---
(ggplot(plot_data_MRV, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Type, fill = Type)) +
  
  # A. The Ellipses (95% Confidence Regions)
  geom_polygon(alpha = 0.2) + # Filled region
  geom_path(linewidth = 1) +  # Outline
  
  # B. The Means (Center points)
  geom_point(data = centers_MRV, size = 3) +
  
  # C. Styling
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Prior" = "#E69F00", "Posterior" = "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Prior" = "#E69F00", "Posterior" = "#56B4E9")) +
  coord_fixed() + # Keeps the geometry true
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "MacroMR Update: Prior vs. Posterior",
       subtitle = "95% Probability Regions",
       x = "start probability state",
       y = "end probability state")
  )+
  (ggplot(plot_data_IRV, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Type, fill = Type)) +
  
  # A. The Ellipses (95% Confidence Regions)
  geom_polygon(alpha = 0.2) + # Filled region
  geom_path(linewidth = 1) +  # Outline
  
  # B. The Means (Center points)
  geom_point(data = centers_IRV, size = 3) +
  
  # C. Styling
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Prior" = "#E69F00", "Posterior" = "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Prior" = "#E69F00", "Posterior" = "#56B4E9")) +
  coord_fixed() + # Keeps the geometry true
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "MacroIR Updeate: Prior vs. Posterior",
       subtitle = "95% Probability Regions",
        x = "start probability state",
       y = "end probability state")
  )
  
```

```{r}

i_step=2
gmean_ij_0_0=d_IRV$gmean_ij_0_0[i_step]
gmean_ij_0_1=d_IRV$gmean_ij_0_1[i_step]
gmean_ij_1_0=d_IRV$gmean_ij_1_0[i_step]
gmean_ij_1_1=d_IRV$gmean_ij_1_1[i_step]

gvar_i_0=d_IRV$gvar_i_0[i_step]
gvar_i_1=d_IRV$gvar_i_0[i_step]

yobs= d_IRV$patch_current[i_step]

dp=data.frame(N0=0:Nch)%>%mutate(p0_0 = (Nch- N0)/Nch, p0_1=N0/Nch)%>%
  cross_join(data.frame(N1=0:Nch)%>%mutate(p1_0 = (Nch- N1)/Nch, p1_1=N1/Nch))
dp<-dp%>%mutate(yfit= Nch*(gmean_ij_0_0*p0_0+gmean_ij_0_1*p0_1+gmean_ij_1_0*p1_0+gmean_ij_1_1*p1_1))%>%
         mutate(yvar= Nch*(gvar_i_0*p0_0+gvar_i_1*p0_1)+noise)%>%
         mutate(logLik= 0.5*(log(2 * pi * yvar)-(yfit-yobs)^2/yvar ))

dp
 








```
